explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: A Form 10-K filing references the establishment of an AI Steering Committee, describing a formal governance structure for AI initiatives. This filing also mentions AI training and general cybersecurity awareness related to governance. Furthermore, a press release highlights strategic relationships with AI vendors and indicates a focus on integrating AI tools for operational improvements and preparedness.

relevant_sources.summary: This 2023 Form 10-K filing provides evidence for the **governance**, **oversight**, and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The establishment of an AI Steering Committee demonstrates a formal governance structure and oversight mechanism for AI initiatives, ensuring alignment with business goals and ethical considerations. Additionally, the mention of AI training and general cybersecurity awareness suggests operational efforts related to privacy and governance in AI.
relevant_sources.title: 2023 Form 10-K

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights CenterPoint Energy's strategic relationships with AI vendors, indicating a focus on oversight and integration of AI tools for operational improvements and preparedness. The document also details the use of AI for prediction, risk detection, and forecasting, demonstrating transparency in how these technologies are being leveraged for grid resilience and emergency response.
relevant_sources.title: First CenterPoint Energy Resiliency Technology Summit Press Release

oversight.findings: A Form 10-K filing references the establishment of an AI Steering Committee. This filing describes a formal oversight mechanism for AI initiatives.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

privacy.findings: A Form 10-K filing mentions AI training and general cybersecurity awareness related to privacy. Additionally, a privacy policy describes the collection of personal information and automated data, and mentions rights related to profiling and targeted advertising.

relevant_sources.summary: The CenterPoint Energy Privacy Policy, a company-owned document, provides evidence for the **privacy** pillar. It supports this pillar by describing the collection of personal information and automated data collection, and by mentioning rights related to profiling and targeted advertising, which imply the use of automated systems for tailoring services and advertisements.
relevant_sources.title: CenterPoint Energy Privacy Policy

transparency.findings: A press release details the use of AI for prediction, risk detection, and forecasting, demonstrating transparency in how these technologies are leveraged for grid resilience and emergency response. It also highlights strategic relationships with AI vendors and indicates a focus on integrating AI tools for operational improvements and preparedness.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights CenterPoint Energy's strategic relationships with AI vendors, indicating a focus on oversight and integration of AI tools for operational improvements and preparedness. The document also details the use of AI for prediction, risk detection, and forecasting, demonstrating transparency in how these technologies are being leveraged for grid resilience and emergency response.

summary.overall_findings: Drawing from 9 publicly available sources, CenterPoint Energy's published materials address 4 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, with evidence found at both operational and policy levels. At the operational level, privacy disclosures include a Form 10-K filing mentioning AI training and general cybersecurity awareness, while governance materials describe a formal governance structure for AI initiatives. Policy-level evidence includes transparency disclosures detailing the use of AI for prediction, risk detection, and forecasting, and oversight materials referencing the establishment of an AI Steering Committee. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 1 additional pillar.
